name: Approval Gate
description: Human-in-the-loop approval surface — registers the forward_captcha agent tool and ships library code (api-approval-gate, browser-approvals) that integrates with openclaw's exec approval infrastructure when the requisite core hooks are configured.

telegramBotToken.description: Telegram bot token for approval prompts and CAPTCHA forwarding

telegramChatId.description: Telegram chat ID where approvals are sent and operator answers

policyFile.description: Path to API approval policy JSON (default: ~/.openclaw/api-approvals.json)
